posts.text:
While they were busy cutting SNAP and health care for working families, Pete Hegseth spent $2 million on King Crab, nearly $7 million on Lobster Tails, and nearly $100,000 on a Grand Piano in the month of September. 

This is where your taxpayer dollars are going.

Isn’t this supposed to be the Administration that’s targeting “waste, fraud, and abuse”?!? Make it make sense.


Headquarters (@HQNewsNow)

While Americans spent the weekend watching gas prices rise because of his illegal war with Iran, Donald Trump spent the weekend golfing. 

America’s sons and daughters are being put in harms way because of his rogue and reckless actions, and this is how he is spending his time. 

This sure doesn’t look like “America first” to me.

The work continues.

posts.text:
My heart breaks for the three service members who have lost their lives, and I am praying for those who were wounded.

America’s sons and daughters are being put in harm’s way because of Donald Trump’s illegal war.

Congress must act to rein in Donald Trump before more lives are lost.

posts.text:
I am heartbroken by yet another mass shooting in this country.

Families woke up today to unimaginable grief after what should’ve been a normal night out in Austin turned into tragedy.

I am praying for all families impacted and those still in critical condition.

Americans should not have to fear sending their children to school, going to the mall, or enjoying a night out. We should all be able to live our lives without the constant fear of gun violence.

posts.text:
The self-proclaimed “President of peace” is once again starting illegal wars without Congressional authorization. This is not what the American people asked for. 

Time and time again, Trump has proven that he is not interested in — or capable of — putting “America First.” Our soldiers will have to put their lives on the line to defend his reckless decisions. Congress must pass a War Powers Resolution to rein in this dangerous overreach before more damage is done.

posts.text:
Today marks 14 years since 17-year-old, unarmed Trayvon Martin was shot and killed while walking home.

14 years later, we’re still demanding a country where our children can walk home in peace — without being treated like a threat.

posts.text: Trump illegally jacked up costs on the American people. The Payback Act says: run us our money back.
posts.quote: Trump illegally jacked up costs on the American people. The Payback Act says: run us our money back.

posts.text:
This is a win for working Americans.

The folks struggling to put food on the table. The small business owners trying to keep their doors open. The farmers caught in the middle of reckless trade wars.

Trump promised to lower costs on day one — yet his reckless, illegal tariffs caused prices to absolutely skyrocket.

Only Congress — not a wannabe king — can impose taxes on the American people.

Donald Trump doesn’t get to ignore the Constitution just because he feels like it.


CNN (@CNN)
